states.name: Eveline
states.title: Pious Acolyte
states.description:
It is a terrible thing to grow up in war. But while Eveline was young, the demons seemed so far away. The type of thing only soldiers worried about. The power of His Radiance and the Holy Maiden kept the rest of them safe.

Mikaela, Eveline's longtime friend, always boasted that she would join the army when she grew up. Eveline wished she could share her courage. She longed to serve her god and her kingdom, but her strength was never in swordsmanship. It was in her piety, which was rivaled only by little Jeanne, and in her wit, which was rivaled by none.

states.name: Eveline
states.title: Pious Acolyte
states.description:
When the demons finally swept through their village, she tried to help Jeanne through her loss. Mikaela had given strength to them both, but as important as she'd been to Eveline, to Jeanne, she was irreplaceable. And now she was gone.

In the end, the grief turned too much to bear. Eveline pledged herself as an acolyte to the church and gradually lost touch with her old friend. But she never forgot about her, and she never lost faith that someday, light would return to her life.

That faith would be rewarded a thousand times over in the years to come.
